CVE-2021-31315.title: Telegram Android <7.1.0 (2090), Telegram iOS <7.1, and Telegram m ...
CVE-2021-31315.summary: Telegram Android <7.1.0 (2090), Telegram iOS <7.1, and Telegram macOS <7.1 are affected by a Stack Based Overflow in the blit function of their custom fork of the rlottie library. A remote attacker might be able to access Telegram's stack memory out-of-bounds on a victim device via a malicious animated sticker.

A remote attacker might be able to access Telegram's heap memory out-of-bounds on a victim device via a malicious animated sticker.
